prompt: Create a vertical close-up studio portrait of a young East Asian woman with warm fair skin, soft natural makeup, glossy brown eyes, and a gentle closed-mouth smile, looking directly at the viewer. She has long dark brown to black hair styled in two loose braids with wispy face-framing strands. She wears a bright sunflower yellow collared linen shirt and a wide woven straw sun hat decorated with dried wildflowers, baby's breath, small yellow blossoms, brown dried sprigs, pinecones, and one prominent sunflower on the right side of the brim. Add matching sunflower drop earrings. In the lower left foreground she holds a rustic bouquet containing exactly 6 visible element types: one large sunflower, yellow wildflowers, beige wheat stalks, dried brown stems, small pale white flowers, and pinecones. Use a rich mustard-yellow seamless background, golden-hour warmth, soft diffused portrait lighting, shallow depth of field, high-detail realistic photography, crisp facial details, natural skin texture, and harmonious monochrome yellow-brown styling. Composition should be a tight chest-up portrait, head and hat filling the upper frame, bouquet partially cropped at bottom left, with no text, no watermark, no extra people, and no distorted facial features.
